ham.subject: Ticket #12345 Resolved – Merge Completed on Branch 'feature/optimize-logging'
ham.body:
Hi Team,

I wanted to let you know that the merge for ticket #12345 has been completed successfully on the 'feature/optimize-logging' branch. The build is passing tests and the deployment pipeline is ready for review.

Key points:
- All unit tests passed (45/45).
- Integration tests ran on staging with no failures.
- The code review was approved by @alice and @bob.

Please pull the latest changes and verify the logs in your local environment. If you encounter any issues, let me know.

Thanks,
John Doe
Lead Engineer

spam.subject: Congratulations! Your Scholarship Application Has Been Approved – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Applicant,

We are pleased to inform you that your application for the Global Scholars Program 2026 has been approved! You have been selected as a recipient of a $10,000 scholarship to cover tuition and living expenses.

To finalize the award, please provide the following documents:
- A copy of your passport
- Your bank account details for direct deposit
- A signed statement confirming your acceptance

Click the secure link below to submit your information:
<URL>

Please complete the submission within 48 hours to secure your scholarship. Failure to comply may result in forfeiture of the award.

Sincerely,
Dr. Emily Carter
Director, Scholarship Office
University of Example
